Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals an extraordinarily rare momentum event dominated by AXTI, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 94.7—an exceptional reading that reflects a 5,173% one-year return paired with perfect SMA alignment across all timeframes and a clean momentum signal of 0.88. AXTI's extraordinary performance extends across all comparison windows, beating SPY by 5,148% and QQQ by 5,141% over the year, while maintaining resilience on down-SPY days with a near-neutral bad_spy_score of -0.0007. In stark contrast, PARR ranks second with a 362% one-year return but shows structural inconsistency: a weak one-week ratio of 0.33 followed by a sharp jump to 15.14 one-month, and critically, it underperforms SPY by 2.55% over one week and carries a positive bad_spy_score of 5.25, indicating it tends to rise when the broader market declines—a red flag for trend sustainability. The data suggests AXTI represents genuine multi-timeframe momentum with broad market correlation (0.362 with SPY), while PARR appears more speculative with weaker consistency and potentially counterintuitive market dynamics.
